full_text:
Wang Yang 王羕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yang (王羕). A staffmember under Sima Shi. He helped bring Li Feng to him. Wang Yang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
